name: n8n-workflow-automation
tagline: ClawHub (157★): Designs and outputs n8n workflow JSON with robust triggers, idempotency, error handling, logging, retries, and human-in-the
verdict: Strong across the board, with quality and security both top marks. The only ding is housekeeping: no version field or changelog, so you can't tell what changed between revisions. Otherwise solid and low-risk.

highlights.summary: No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
